name: MikroTik RB5009UG+S+IN
excerpt: The best sub-$200 router I've owned. RouterOS has a steep learning curve but the hardware is rock-solid and the feature set is absurd for the price.

name: Tailscale
excerpt: Great for what it is, but the free tier limits sting and I'd rather self-host Headscale. Setup was effortless though.

name: TP-Link EAP670
excerpt: Fine specs on paper but the Omada controller software is a mess and the hardware runs warm. Returned it after a week.

name: Proxmox VE
excerpt: The virtualization platform I should have switched to years ago. Web UI is functional, clustering works, and the community is excellent.
